Class MeterController

java.lang.Object
lcr.controller.MeterController
public class MeterController extends Object
Main application controller coordinating UI user interactions from the view layer and driving async transactional updates to the underlying LCR meter hardware. * @author sylkat

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    final MeterBusiness
    meterBusiness
     

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    MeterController(MeterView meterView)
    Constructs the controller core, mapping business services and attaching the target view component as a measurement lifecycle observer.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    applyConfiguration(ConfigDTO config)
    Suspends the reader thread polling and dispatches a full configuration block payload sequence to the instrument registers in a decoupled thread task.
    void
    changeAperture(Aperture aper)
    Asynchronously updates the measurement integration window speed aperture parameter.
    void
    changeAutoRange(boolean auto)
    Asynchronously toggles automatic hardware scale configuration tracking loops.
    void
    changeBias(BiasVoltage bias)
    Asynchronously updates the internal physical DC bias injection voltage configuration.
    void
    changeFrequency(Frequency freq)
    Asynchronously updates the hardware sampling signal frequency parameter.
    void
    changePrimaryParameter(PrimaryParameter prim)
    Asynchronously updates the instrument primary reading display mode selector.
    void
    changeRange(Range range)
    Asynchronously locks the instrument tracking window inside a strict manual scaling bracket.
    void
    changeSecondaryParameter(SecondaryParameter sec)
    Asynchronously updates the instrument secondary reading display mode selector.
    void
    changeSeriesMode(SeriesMode mode)
    Asynchronously updates the equivalent circuit matching circuit standard topology.
    void
    changeVoltage(Voltage volt)
    Asynchronously updates the hardware operational signal voltage limit.
    boolean
    connectButtonPressed(String selectedPort, SupportedMeter selectedModel)
    Handles connection toggle actions from the UI button event, routing either a setup connection flow or an immediate graceful disconnect routine.
    void
    disconnect()
    Tears down active streaming worker threads and safely disconnects the physical hardware device link.
    Object
    getSerialLock()
    Retrieves the structural synchronization reference for multi-threaded thread operations.

    • meterBusiness

      public final MeterBusiness meterBusiness

  • Constructor Details

    • MeterController

      public MeterController(MeterView meterView)
      Constructs the controller core, mapping business services and attaching the target view component as a measurement lifecycle observer. * @param meterView the main UI frame view presentation instance

  • Method Details

    • connectButtonPressed

      public boolean connectButtonPressed(String selectedPort, SupportedMeter selectedModel)
      Handles connection toggle actions from the UI button event, routing either a setup connection flow or an immediate graceful disconnect routine. * @param selectedPort the OS communication channel interface identifier
      Parameters:
      selectedModel - the specific hardware manufacturer enum model type
      Returns:
      true if the toggle state switch operation finishes successfully

    • disconnect

      public void disconnect()
      Tears down active streaming worker threads and safely disconnects the physical hardware device link.

    • applyConfiguration

      public void applyConfiguration(ConfigDTO config)
      Suspends the reader thread polling and dispatches a full configuration block payload sequence to the instrument registers in a decoupled thread task. * @param config the structural configuration data transfer object

    • changeFrequency

      public void changeFrequency(Frequency freq)
      Asynchronously updates the hardware sampling signal frequency parameter. * @param freq the target test signal Frequency enum item

    • changeVoltage

      public void changeVoltage(Voltage volt)
      Asynchronously updates the hardware operational signal voltage limit. * @param volt the target test level Voltage enum item

    • changeAperture

      public void changeAperture(Aperture aper)
      Asynchronously updates the measurement integration window speed aperture parameter. * @param aper the target resolution Aperture speed mode

    • changePrimaryParameter

      public void changePrimaryParameter(PrimaryParameter prim)
      Asynchronously updates the instrument primary reading display mode selector. * @param prim the target PrimaryParameter measurement selector

    • changeSecondaryParameter

      public void changeSecondaryParameter(SecondaryParameter sec)
      Asynchronously updates the instrument secondary reading display mode selector. * @param sec the target SecondaryParameter measurement selector

    • changeSeriesMode

      public void changeSeriesMode(SeriesMode mode)
      Asynchronously updates the equivalent circuit matching circuit standard topology. * @param mode the structural SeriesMode configuration matrix

    • changeAutoRange

      public void changeAutoRange(boolean auto)
      Asynchronously toggles automatic hardware scale configuration tracking loops. * @param auto true to hook into automatic scaling hardware routines

    • changeRange

      public void changeRange(Range range)
      Asynchronously locks the instrument tracking window inside a strict manual scaling bracket. * @param range the discrete electrical Range value parameter bracket

    • changeBias

      public void changeBias(BiasVoltage bias)
      Asynchronously updates the internal physical DC bias injection voltage configuration. * @param bias the target hardware BiasVoltage injection steps level

    • getSerialLock

      public Object getSerialLock()
      Retrieves the structural synchronization reference for multi-threaded thread operations. * @return the shared serial resource locker mutex object
